original_abstract: Business ethics serves as a cornerstone for developing resilient and competitive organizations, primarily through strategic planning, transparent procedural systems, and a consistent corporate culture. This study investigates the impact of ethical standards at PT. Nesia Pan Pacific Clothing, utilizing direct observation and semi-structured interviews with a diverse sample of employees. The findings demonstrate that a robust ethical framework significantly enhances workforce performance by fostering a positive and motivating organizational climate. Specifically, practices rooted in transparency, fairness, and social responsibility cultivate a deep sense of trust and loyalty among staff. This alignment between corporate values and employee experience not only drives operational efficiency but also substantively elevates the overall quality of output across the company.
humanized_abstract: Business ethics is one of the building block of the robust and competitive company, through the activities of strategic planning, rules and procedure, and even the company culture. This research aims to analyze the impact of business ethics at PT. Nesia Pan Pacific Clothing, through the direct observation and the interviews to the employees in several departments. The results shows that the company with strong ethics will be able to improve the performance of the employees, through creating of the good working environment. Good working environment is created through the application of the ethics principles of transparency, fairness, and social responsibility. The application of the ethics principles of transparency, fairness, and social responsibility will increase the employee trust to the company, and thus the employee loyalty to the company will be created. As a result, the company will be able to increase the efficiency of the work, and will be able to improve the quality of the products and services produced by the company.
